mapper.select:
SELECT permission_user.id , permission_user.deleted , permission_user.created_at as createdAt , permission_user.modified_at as modifiedAt
, permission_user.permission_id as permissionId , permission_user.user_id as userId
, user.username as userUsername FROM permission_user, user WHERE permission_user.id = #{id} AND permission_user.user_id = user.id
SELECT count(permission_user.id) as listsize FROM permission_user

SELECT permission_user.id FROM permission_user
ORDER BY permission_user.id ORDER BY permission_user.title DESC ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{perpage}

SELECT permission_user.id FROM permission_user
AND #{mark} > permission_user.id ORDER BY permission_user.id DESC
AND permission_user.id > #{mark} ORDER BY permission_user.id ASC
AND #{mark} > CONCAT(permission_user.title, '_', permission_user.id) ORDER BY permission_user.title DESC
AND CONCAT(permission_user.title, '_', permission_user.id) > #{mark} ORDER BY permission_user.title ASC
LIMIT 0, #{perpage}
